title: Eutriana humilis

uses: Eutriana humilis is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues. Its leaves are used to make a decoction that helps to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. In some parts of the world, the plant is also used to treat respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. The root of the plant is believed to have antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating skin infections. More research is needed to fully understand the medicinal properties and uses of Eutriana humilis.
